coaching.default.acknowledgment: You kept moving even when the day pushed back.
coaching.default.insight: The session landed in a {{status}} pattern at {{ratio}} of plan.
coaching.default.nextStep: Tomorrow: add a short buffer before the first deep-work block.
coaching.extraRunway.acknowledgment: You held the work together without losing the thread.
coaching.extraRunway.insight: Your pacing landed at {{ratio}} of the baseline, while interruptions stayed contained.
coaching.extraRunway.nextStep: Tomorrow: split the opening step in half or move the task up one complexity level.
coaching.highInterruptions.acknowledgmen: You kept momentum through a noisy day and still closed the loop.
coaching.highInterruptions.insight: Most friction came from {{dominantCause}}, with about {{minutes}} of interrupted time.
coaching.highInterruptions.nextStep: Tomorrow: start with one protected 20-minute sprint before checking messages.
coaching.onTrack.acknowledgment: You matched the plan with steady follow-through.
coaching.onTrack.insight: The day finished on the expected rhythm, with no major recovery cost.
coaching.onTrack.nextStep: Tomorrow: repeat the same opening routine and keep the first sprint length unchanged.
heroLead: Review the work, notice the friction honestly, and leave with one practical adjustment for tomorrow.
heroTitle: Close the day without turning it into a scorecard.
historyLead: Historical entries keep the question version that was active when they were submitted.
initialNote: The first reset worked once messages were closed.
noSubmissions: No submissions yet for this test date.
questionsLead: These are read-only here. Answers are stored locally as numbers, while you see text labels.
strategy.0: Foreground heartbeats are expected about every 90 seconds during active focus.
strategy.1: Two missed heartbeats trigger a check-in; the channel prefers in-app first, then push.
strategy.2: Mobile browsers can throttle background JavaScript, so resume pings matter when the page returns to foreground.
summaryLead: One acknowledgment, one signal, one next move.
